instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `swap-vars` that exchanges the values of two variables through a hidden temporary binding the caller cannot accidentally shadow.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 X))
            (SETF X Y)
            (SETF Y #:G1))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 X))
            (SETF X Y)
            (SETF Y #:G112))

--- stderr ---
